columns.column_name: Adverse Events - N (%) | All-Cause Grade 3 or Higher | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: Sum the counts and percentages for "Grade 3", "Grade 4", and "Grade 5 (death)" from the "All Patients - Darolutamide (n = 652)" column in Table 3.
columns.column_name_raw: Adverse Events - N (%) | All-Cause Grade 3 or Higher | Treatment

columns.column_name: Adverse Events - N (%) | All-Cause Grade 3 or Higher | Control
columns.extraction_plan: Sum the counts and percentages for "Grade 3", "Grade 4", and "Grade 5 (death)" from the "All Patients - Placebo (n = 650)" column in Table 3.
columns.column_name_raw: Adverse Events - N (%) | All-Cause Grade 3 or Higher | Control

columns.column_name: Adverse Events - N (%) | Treatment-related Grade 3 or Higher | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: Table 3 (Chunk 5, page 9) lists "Worst grade" for "Any AE" (all-cause), but does not specify "treatment-related" for these grades. The abstract (Chunk 8, page 1) mentions "Grade 3 or 4 AEs" but does not specify if they are treatment-related.
columns.column_name_raw: Adverse Events - N (%) | Treatment-related Grade 3 or Higher | Treatment

columns.column_name: Adverse Events - N (%) | Treatment-related Grade 3 or Higher | Control
columns.extraction_plan: Table 3 (Chunk 5, page 9) lists "Worst grade" for "Any AE" (all-cause), but does not specify "treatment-related" for these grades. The abstract (Chunk 8, page 1) mentions "Grade 3 or 4 AEs" but does not specify if they are treatment-related.
columns.column_name_raw: Adverse Events - N (%) | Treatment-related Grade 3 or Higher | Control

columns.column_name: Adverse Events - N (%) | Treatment-related Grade 5 | Treatment
columns.extraction_plan: Table 3 (Chunk 5, page 9) lists "Grade 5 (death)" for "Any AE" (all-cause), which is 27 (4.1%) for the darolutamide arm. Footnote 'd' indicates that "Specific grade 5 events are provided in the supplementary appendix of Smith et al.", but this appendix is not provided in the available chunks.
columns.column_name_raw: Adverse Events - N (%) | Treatment-related Grade 5 | Treatment

columns.column_name: Adverse Events - N (%) | Treatment-related Grade 5 | Control
columns.extraction_plan: Table 3 (Chunk 5, page 9) lists "Grade 5 (death)" for "Any AE" (all-cause), which is 26 (4.0%) for the placebo arm. Footnote 'd' indicates that "Specific grade 5 events are provided in the supplementary appendix of Smith et al.", but this appendix is not provided in the available chunks.
columns.column_name_raw: Adverse Events - N (%) | Treatment-related Grade 5 | Control
